$comment: Layer C for REORDER vs the real GnuCOBOL harness image (OCCURS INDEXED BY, docs/occurs-indexed.md). Input 0 is the demand quantity (PIC 9(5)V99). The price cells are constants; the index PX is a numeric occurrence-number variable driven by PERFORM VARYING (the table sum) and by SET PX TO 1 / SET PX UP BY 2 (constant-folded to occurrence 3). WS-BASE = WS-QTY * price(3) is affine over the input, so the 5% fee's ROUNDED half-cent boundary is congruence-solved and the BULK tier (total > 500) splits on the affine total.

legacy.label: COBOL 85 REORDER (GnuCOBOL via harness image legacymind/legacy-reorder)
